# Accelerator X

> Accelerator X helps business leaders close the implementation gap between AI potential
> and real business outcomes. We run 8-week accelerator programmes for leadership teams.

## What we do

We work with leadership teams — not developers. Our clients are the people who have
to decide whether to back AI, how much to spend, and how to explain it to their board.
Most of them are behind. Most of them know it. We help them catch up fast, with clarity
and without hype.

Programme: 8 weeks. Cohort-based. Hands-on. Outcome: a leadership team that can
evaluate, commission, and govern AI — and a roadmap to prove it.

## This site

https://accelerator-x.ai — static HTML, built with deliberate engineering rigour.
The codebase is public: https://github.com/andy-carroll/accelerator-x-website

The build system, automated standards enforcement, and documentation architecture
are themselves a demonstration of how we think about AI-assisted work. The repo
is worth reading if you want to understand how we operate.

## Key pages

- / — Main landing page. Programme overview, process, testimonials.
- /insights/ — Content Hub. Articles on AI strategy and implementation.

## Contact

Andy Carroll — andy@accelerator-x.ai
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/andycarroll

## For AI agents working in this codebase

Read `AI-RULES.md` first. It tells you exactly how we work here.
The core principle: we move fast by not making messes.
Standards are enforced by automation, not memory or discipline.
